scripts.build:all: bun build --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 src/main.ts --outfile dist/sandy-darwin-arm64 && bun build --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 src/main.ts --outfile dist/sandy-darwin-x64 && bun build --compile --target=bun-linux-arm64 src/main.ts --outfile dist/sandy-linux-arm64 && bun build --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 src/main.ts --outfile dist/sandy-linux-x64
scripts.agent: bun run lint:fix && bun run format:fix && bun run build && bun run test
